learnings.text: The catalog.json file already exists at Sites/store-va/data/catalog.json - created in previous work. When working with existing data files, verify schema before building loader. tsconfig.json already has resolveJsonModule: true for Zo sites - no additional config needed.

YAML multiline parsing: Use manual regex-based parsing instead of yaml.safe_load to handle | literal block scalars without requiring PyYAML dependency. The parsing needs to collect all indented lines after | marker.

Path sanitization: Patterns must account for paths at end of string ($), before various separators, and in quoted contexts. Use character class like ([/\s"'\'\)]|$) to capture context and preserve it.
Image Generation: Inspect tailwind.config/CSS variables for specific color names (e.g. 'zinc-900', 'sky-400') to align generated aesthetics with UI. [Source: D1.3]
